name: Equipment Rental > Heavy Equipment > Mini Excavator
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Heavy Equipment > Mini Excavator
basis: Rental passthrough - no HoneyDone labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a small mini excavator (1-2 ton), the size a handyman job would use. Delivery billed separately. Yard bills by day, not hour, despite unit tag.
sources: DOZR Melbourne FL mini excavator avg $514/day, small 4,000 lb $197/day, 8,000 lb $242/day (2026); Home Depot Kubota K008/U17 class. Typical small-mini day rate ~$250-300.

name: Equipment Rental > Heavy Equipment > Skid Steer
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Heavy Equipment > Skid Steer
basis: Rental passthrough - no labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a compact/small skid steer. Attachments and delivery billed separately. Day-rate basis despite hour unit tag.
sources: Florida skid steer $250-$600/day by size (rentproco 2026); Home Depot tracked skid steer TZ-34/20 class; attachments +$75-$200/day, delivery $150-$400. Small-machine day ~$275-325.

name: Equipment Rental > Power Tools > Circular Saw
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Power Tools > Circular Saw
basis: Rental passthrough - no labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a circular saw. Handyman normally owns one; line exists for specialty blades/large-tooth cases. Day-rate basis.
sources: Home Depot / big-box power-tool day rates ~$30-50/day for a circular/worm-drive saw (2026). Handyman typically owns this - rental line is a rare passthrough.

name: Equipment Rental > Power Tools > Nail Gun
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Power Tools > Nail Gun
basis: Rental passthrough - no labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a nailer (framing/finish) with compressor if needed. Handyman usually owns one. Day-rate basis.
sources: Big-box framing/finish nailer + compressor day rate ~$35-55/day (2026). Handyman often owns cordless nailer - rare passthrough.

name: Equipment Rental > Scaffolding > Extension Ladder
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Scaffolding > Extension Ladder
basis: Rental passthrough - no labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a tall extension ladder (28-40 ft), rented only when job exceeds owned ladder height. Day-rate basis.
sources: Home Depot Werner 26 ft / 32 ft extension ladder rental class; big-box extension ladder day rate ~$25-50/day (2026). Handyman usually owns up to 24-28 ft.

name: Equipment Rental > Scaffolding > Rolling Scaffold
taxonomy_path: Labor > Equipment Rental > Scaffolding > Rolling Scaffold
basis: Rental passthrough - no labor markup. market_price = local daily rate for a rolling scaffold tower/set (drywall, ceilings, high walls). Multi-day rentals discount. Day-rate basis.
sources: Rolling scaffold $50-$125/day (homeguide 2026); Home Depot Metaltech scaffold set. Interior/exterior mobile tower typical day ~$50-75.
